---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a building, feature, or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A short description of what you'd like.

## Problem It Solves

What building task or workflow is currently tedious or unsupported?

## Proposed Solution

How you imagine it working, including any key controls or UI.

## Alternatives Considered

Other ways you thought about solving this, or workarounds you currently use.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, videos, or examples from other mods if applicable.
